title: [F-042] forge-fs write_preview leaks arbitrary file contents into approval event
[F-043] forge-session passes allowed_paths = [**] — fs tools reach any absolute path
[F-044] forge-session UDS socket falls back to world-accessible /tmp path with shared UID
[F-045] forge-providers NDJSON line buffer is unbounded — local squatter can OOM session
[F-046] forge-providers reqwest client has no timeouts — slow-drip DoS
[F-047] forge-session shell.exec timeout orphans sandboxed child; survives session shutdown
[F-048] forge-cli session_kill passes pid<=0 to libc::kill, signaling process group
[F-049] forge-cli session_kill has no PID ownership or staleness check
[F-050] forge-shell CSP is null — no defense-in-depth against webview XSS
[F-051] forge-shell Tauri commands have no per-session authorization — any window can approve any session
[F-052] forge-shell session_hello accepts arbitrary filesystem socket_path
[F-053] forge-session ignores client-supplied ApprovalScope; always records Once
[F-054] forge-session shell.exec cwd accepted verbatim and omitted from approval preview
[F-055] forge-session sandbox missing RLIMIT_NPROC/NOFILE/FSIZE — fork-bomb and disk-fill feasible
[F-056] forge-session UDS pre-bind remove_file → bind is a TOCTOU race
[F-057] forge-cli unvalidated session_id interpolated into pid/socket paths
[F-058] forge-providers OLLAMA_BASE_URL trusted without scheme/host validation
[F-059] forge-providers list_models() buffers entire response body with no size cap
[F-060] forge-core unbounded line reads in event_log::read_since and Transcript::from_file
[F-061] forge-fs no size limit on read_file/write/edit — memory DoS
[F-062] forge-shell session:event is broadcast app-wide — cross-session disclosure
[F-063] forge-shell capability glob session-* + unvalidated session-id in window label
[F-064] web/packages/app session:event payloads cast to string without runtime narrowing
[F-065] forge-core SessionMeta lacks deny_unknown_fields — forward-compat trust drift
[F-066] forge-session shell.exec timeout_ms has no ceiling
[F-067] forge-core ToolCallId is 64-bit — bump to 128 at next touch
[F-068] forge-shell session_send_message has no text-size bound below 4 MiB wire cap
[F-069] forge-shell session_approve_tool accepts scope: String without enum validation
[F-070] Phase 1 supply-chain hygiene — cargo scanners in CI, workspace licensing, unmaintained deps
